instruction: Select the right playbook for CRUD module creation.
input: Need a new page with list, create, edit, permissions, and optional APIs.
expected_output: Use create-end-to-end-crud-module.md first, then create-module-route.md, create-form-builder-form.md, create-grid.md, create-dynamic-rest-api.md if needed, and add-role-based-menu-access.md.
notes: Read AGENTS.md and KB-MAP.md before implementing.

instruction: Select the right playbook for an existing module change.
input: Need to modify one existing JQuiver page.
expected_output: Use modify-existing-module.md. Inspect route, target metadata, dependencies, permissions, datasource, templates, APIs, file bins, labels, and rollback plan before edits.

instruction: Select the right playbook for role-based menu access.
input: A role should see a menu item and use its page.
expected_output: Use add-role-based-menu-access.md. Verify route/menu metadata, target entity permissions, backing APIs, grids, forms, file downloads, and unauthorized denial behavior.
notes: Menu visibility alone is not enough.

instruction: Select the right playbook for a reporting page.
input: Need a read-only report with filters and export-like behavior.
expected_output: Use create-reporting-page.md and decide whether the report should be a grid, dashboard, dashlet, template, or API. Verify query performance, permissions, and sensitive fields.
notes: Prefer views or aggregate queries for heavy reports.

instruction: Select the right playbook for Form.io external embedding.
input: Need to embed a survey form in another web app.
expected_output: Use create-formio-pluggable-form.md and embed-formio-external-app.md. Verify jq_form_io, jq_formio_route, route access, single/multi submit, frame policy, persistence, and data retention.
notes: Use placeholder iframe URLs until real routes are approved.

instruction: Select the right playbook for additional datasource setup.
input: Need to use an external database in an autocomplete and grid.
expected_output: Use configure-additional-datasource.md, then configure-autocomplete-typeahead.md and create-grid.md. Redact credentials, verify datasource_id, SQL dialect, connectivity, and consumers.
notes: Do not copy datasource IDs across instances.

instruction: Select the right playbook for scheduler creation.
expected_output: Use configure-scheduler.md. Verify target Dynamic REST API, cleanup side effects, cron, timezone, active flag, environment policy, logs, and rollback plan.
notes: Cleanup jobs can delete or modify data; require explicit approval.

instruction: Select the right playbook for template email changes.
input: Need to change an email/XML template used by a reminder job.
expected_output: Use configure-template-email-webclient.md and configure-notification-mail.md. Identify template consumers, merge fields, scheduler/API chain, test recipients, output escaping, and rollback body/checksum.
notes: Do not send production email during testing.

instruction: Select the right playbook for script library changes.
input: Need to update shared script code used by Dynamic REST APIs.
expected_output: Use configure-script-library.md. Inspect jq_script_lib_details, jq_script_lib_connect, all consumers, template/body dependency, runtime scope, tests, and rollback plan.
notes: Shared scripts can affect multiple APIs.

instruction: Select the right playbook for business module migration packaging.
input: Need to group all metadata for a feature before migration.
expected_output: Use configure-business-module-and-tags.md and migrate-instance-configuration.md. List routes, forms, grids, APIs, templates, file bins, labels, roles, script libraries, business module rows, tag rows, and dependencies.
notes: Do not treat business modules as the same thing as menu modules.
